name: titan_summon_summary
primary_question: What does the v1 compatibility surface expose when no owner Titan swarm ledger was observed, without interpreting missing input as observed zero activity?
derivation_rule: publish an explicit no-observed-ledger baseline whose zero fields mean that no ledger was projected and infer no activity from roster or helper defaults
authority_ceiling: Weaker than any owner-local Titan swarm ledger, closeout audit, report, finding, memory candidate, and bounded eval verdict; this surface is a compatibility baseline only.
